user.title: HA Optimiser Setup
user.description: Configure the Optimiser. It will scan your Home Assistant instance for unused entities, automations, scripts and helpers.

data.stale_days_threshold: Days without state change to consider stale
data.enable_soft_delete: Enable Soft Delete (disable before hard delete)
data.soft_delete_days: Days in soft-delete before permanent removal

data_description.scan_interval_days: Set to 0 to disable automatic scanning. Recommended: 7 days.
data_description.stale_days_threshold: Entities with no state change for this many days will be flagged. Recommended: 30 days.
data_description.enable_soft_delete: When enabled, entities are disabled (reversible) before being permanently deleted.
data_description.soft_delete_days: After this many days in the trash, entities are permanently deleted automatically.
data_description.exclude_device_classes: Comma-separated list of device classes that will NEVER be suggested for deletion (e.g. smoke,motion,door).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Home Assistant internals

init.title: HA Optimiser Options
init.description: Adjust settings for HA Optimiser. Changes take effect immediately after saving.

data.stale_days_threshold: Days without state change to consider stale
data.enable_soft_delete: Enable Soft Delete (disable before hard delete)
data.soft_delete_days: Days in soft-delete before permanent removal

data_description.scan_interval_days: Set to 0 to disable automatic scanning. Recommended: 7 days.
data_description.stale_days_threshold: Entities with no state change for this many days will be flagged. Recommended: 30 days.
data_description.enable_soft_delete: When enabled, entities are disabled (reversible) before being permanently deleted.
data_description.soft_delete_days: After this many days in the trash, entities are permanently deleted automatically.
data_description.exclude_device_classes: Comma-separated list of device classes that will NEVER be suggested for deletion (e.g. smoke,motion,door).

scan.name: Scan for unused entities
scan.description: Scans the Home Assistant instance for unused entities, automations, scripts, and helpers. Results are saved and fired as an event.

purge.name: Purge selected entities
purge.description: Purges (disables or deletes) the specified entities. Use soft_delete=true to disable (reversible), soft_delete=false to permanently delete.

soft_delete.name: Soft delete
soft_delete.description: If true (default), entities are disabled and moved to trash (can be restored). If false, entities are permanently deleted.

restore.name: Restore soft-deleted entity
restore.description: Re-enables a previously soft-deleted (disabled) entity and removes it from the trash.

get_results.name: Get last scan results
get_results.description: Returns the last scan results as a service response, including trash (soft-deleted) entities.

analyze_fingerprint.name: Analyse Fingerprint
analyze_fingerprint.description: Compares today's HA behaviour against its own historical baseline — detects anomalies in state writes, automation triggers, and integration reconnects.

collect_baseline.name: Collect Baseline
collect_baseline.description: Captures yesterday's metrics snapshot and saves it to the baseline store. Normally runs automatically at 00:05 each day. Call manually on first install.

analyze_recorder.name: Analyse Recorder DB
analyze_recorder.description: Queries the recorder database to find top-writing entities, wasteful records, and suggests recorder YAML optimizations.

analyze_dashboard.name: Analyse Dashboard
analyze_dashboard.description: Reads Lovelace dashboard config from .storage to detect heavy cards, missing entities, and other performance issues.

analyze_storms.name: Detect State Storms
analyze_storms.description: Finds entities that are updating their state abnormally fast, causing database bloat and browser performance issues.

analyze_dead_code.name: Analyse Automation Dead Code
analyze_dead_code.description: Scans automations for broken triggers, actions, or conditions that reference entities that no longer exist.

analyze_health.name: Check Integration Health
analyze_health.description: Scores integration health based on reconnect frequency, battery levels, and unavailability patterns over the last 7 days.

analyze_addons.name: Analyse Add-ons
analyze_addons.description: Queries the Supervisor API to return host resource usage (CPU, RAM, disk, OS) and the full add-on list with per-addon state, version, update status, and runtime stats.
